notes: Generated in the parent thread using the built-in image generation tool.
Final board follows the existing vertical project character-board layout: three full-body states plus lower detail and material panels.

Visual identity preserves Lu Mi as a beautiful young adult Frosthoof deer noble shaman, with clear deer ears, short antlers or bone-gold antler ornaments, rare white fur layers, ice-blue woven garment, bone-white robe, jade clasps, aurora-green beads, bone flute, snow herb pouch, and small ice-blue shaman fire.

The locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem was not redesigned. Northern symbol language appears as antler-branch trim, bonewood, rawhide cord, beads, and ritual object details rather than a new crest or public badge.
No background Codex thread was created because this was a single-asset direct parent generation.
